description_long: This is a medium-sized residential house surrounded by a well-maintained garden and enclosed by a low fence. The house features a combination of flat and slightly sloped roofs, with a central entryway accessible via a short set of steps and a paved walkway. The exterior walls are finished in a muted greenish-gray color, complemented by white trim around the windows and doors. The landscaping includes several mature trees, shrubs, and flowering plants, providing a lush and inviting atmosphere. Windows are arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern, with some larger panes facing the front and smaller ones on the sides and rear. The property includes a driveway leading to the side, and the overall design suggests a blend of modern and Craftsman architectural influences.
description: A modern Craftsman-style house with flat and sloped roofs, surrounded by landscaped gardens, mature trees, and a low perimeter fence. The exterior features muted greenish-gray walls, white trim, and a prominent central entryway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with steps, symmetrical landscaping, and a clear path leading to the house.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, side garden, and the flat roof sections; some bright lighting obscures part of the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back garden, additional windows, and the enclosed yard with more trees and shrubs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side yard, more trees, and the continuation of the perimeter fence and walkway.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with some larger front-facing windows
attribute_entryway_design: Central entryway with steps, a small porch, and decorative columns flanking the main door
